toast.noLocalPath: No local path for this image

toast.optimizeCheckConfig: Optimization failed. Please check the chat model config.

refImage.title: Style reference images ({{count}}/10)
refImage.collapsedHint: Click to expand and upload reference images for image-to-image

toast.busy: Please wait for the current operation to finish
toast.chatConfigMissing: Please configure a vision model in Settings first

provider.label: Provider
provider.openaiImageLimit: OpenAI providers currently support only 1K images
provider.geminiBasePathHint: For Gemini, use only the host as Base URL (avoid /v1 or endpoint paths).
provider.yunwuMissingV1Hint: For Yunwu API, Base URL should include /v1
provider.yunwuExtraPathHint: For Yunwu API, keep Base URL at /v1 only (no deeper path)

vision.title: Vision Config
vision.hint: Used for image-to-prompt and other vision features
vision.apiKeyHint: Must match the Base URL and model above

retry.hint: Only applies when the upstream closes the connection right after send; set 0 to disable auto retry

refImageCompression.label: Reference Image Compression
refImageCompression.hint: When enabled, reference images will be automatically compressed to save bandwidth and storage
refImageCompression.speedHint: Only improves generation speed when using reference images; it should not affect image quality.

promptOptimizeDefault.label: Default Prompt Optimization
promptOptimizeDefault.hint: When enabled, image generation first optimizes the prompt inside the backend task, then continues generating without overwriting the current editor input.

update.title: Updates
update.autoNote: The app checks for updates automatically; if a new version is available, you'll be prompted to download and install.

logs.title: Diagnostics
logs.help: If you encounter issues, please send app.log and server.log to the developer (logs may include prompts).

toast.imageConfigIncomplete: Please complete the image model config
toast.chatConfigIncomplete: Please complete the chat model config
toast.openaiGeminiUnsupported: OpenAI base URL does not support Gemini models. Please use a compatible endpoint.
toast.geminiBasePathWarning: Gemini Base URL contains a path (such as /v1). It is recommended to use a host-only URL.
toast.logDirDesktopOnly: Log folder is available on desktop only
toast.logDirCopyFailedManual: Copy failed. Please open the log folder manually.
toast.timeoutTooSmall: Timeout must be at least {{min}} seconds

onboarding.label: Onboarding Tour
onboarding.hint: Replay the feature tour to quickly revisit the workflow
onboarding.confirmHint: The tour will start from step one. Continue?

versionBadge.available: New version v{{version}} available. Click to view/install.

updater.downloadHint: You can close this window and keep using the app while the download continues in the background.
updater.downloadedHint: The update package is ready. Click "Install and Restart" to finish.
updater.installingHint: Installing. Please keep the app open.
updater.errorFallback: Update failed. Please try again later.
updater.errorExtra: If you just integrated Updater, set `plugins.updater.pubkey` in `desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json` and configure `TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY` in CI.

toast.checkFailedManifest: Update check failed: latest.json not found
toast.checkFailedPubkey: Update check failed: missing signing public key
toast.installManual: Update installed. Please restart the app.

batch.exportFailedServer: Export failed: server returned an error
batch.exportPartial: Exported with missing files (see missing.txt in the zip)
batch.exportFailedRetry: Export failed. Please try again later.
batch.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
batch.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again later.
batch.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.

empty.title: Start creating your images
empty.subtitle: Enter a prompt on the left, or upload reference images for image-to-image.

grid.empty: No generated images yet. Configure on the left and start generating.
grid.limitNotice: Showing the first {{max}} images out of {{total}}
grid.limitHint: Tip: For best performance, generate in batches or clear history.

submitting.title: Starting generation task
submitting.subtitle: Connecting to the AI model, please wait...

toast.missingApiKey: Please configure the image API key

batch.title: Generation Settings
batch.ratioAutoAdjusted: Aspect ratio {{from}} is unsupported and was adjusted to {{to}}

config.apiKeyHint: Please configure the image API key in the top-right settings first

codes.unknown: Generation failed. Please try again later.
codes.queue_full: The task queue is full. Please try again later.
codes.app_interrupted: The task was interrupted by an app restart or exit. Please start it again.
codes.task_timeout: Generation timed out before the result was returned. Please try again later.
codes.request_canceled: The request was canceled before generation completed.
codes.prompt_optimize_auth_missing: Default prompt optimization is missing the chat model API key. Please complete it in Settings and save again.
codes.prompt_optimize_model_missing: Default prompt optimization has no available chat model. Please complete it in Settings and save again.
codes.prompt_optimize_provider_missing: The chat provider config for default prompt optimization is missing. Please complete it in Settings and save again.
codes.local_permission_denied: The app does not have permission to write to the local file or folder. Please check the save path, disk permissions, or system authorization.
codes.policy_blocked: The upstream returned text but no image. This may have triggered safety or policy restrictions. Please adjust the prompt or reference image and try again.
codes.no_image_data: The upstream returned a response, but it did not contain image data. Please try again later.
codes.quota_exceeded: The upstream quota is exhausted or restricted. Please check your balance, plan, or permissions.
codes.bad_request: The upstream rejected the request format or parameters. Please check the prompt, model, image parameters, or request content.
codes.unauthorized: Upstream authentication failed. Please check whether the API key or token is correct or has expired.
codes.forbidden: The upstream rejected the request. This is usually caused by insufficient permission, account restrictions, or model access limits.
codes.not_found: The requested resource was not found. The model, endpoint, or upstream path may not exist.
codes.request_timeout: The upstream request timed out before the image result was returned. Please try again later.
codes.request_too_large: The request body is too large. Please reduce image size, the number of reference images, or overly long input content, then try again.
codes.rate_limited: The upstream is busy or rate limiting the request. Please try again later.
codes.internal_server_error: The upstream service encountered an internal error. This is usually a server-side issue. Please try again later.
codes.bad_gateway: The upstream gateway failed and the result was not returned correctly. Please try again later.
codes.service_unavailable: The upstream service is temporarily unavailable, possibly due to maintenance or overload. Please try again later.
codes.gateway_timeout: The upstream gateway timed out before the result was returned. Please try again later.
codes.tls_error: A secure connection to the upstream failed. Please try again later.
codes.dns_error: Failed to resolve the upstream address. Please check the network or service address configuration.
codes.connection_refused: Could not connect to the upstream service. Please check the service address or network connectivity.
codes.upstream_connection_closed: The upstream connection was closed early, so the image result was not returned to the app. Please try again later.
codes.timeout: The request timed out before the image result was returned. Please try again later.

layout.backendBanner: Backend not ready. Some features may be unavailable.

toast.backendUnavailable: Backend unavailable. Please try again later.

preview.title: Template Preview
preview.imageFailedHint: Image failed to load. You can still view template info.

labels.ratioAutoAdjusted: Aspect ratio {{from}} not supported, auto-adjusted to {{to}}

welcome.title: Welcome to Banana AI
welcome.content: This quick tour introduces the core workflow in about a minute.

settings.title: Settings entry
settings.content: Configure models, API keys, language, updates, and more.

prompt.title: Enter your prompt
prompt.content: Describe the image you want to generate in natural language.

optimizeNormal.title: Prompt optimize
optimizeNormal.content: Refines plain text prompts for more stable generation results.

optimizeJson.title: JSON optimize
optimizeJson.content: Outputs structured prompts for fine-grained control.

resolution.title: Resolution and ratio
resolution.content: Set image quality and aspect ratio here.

refImageUpload.title: Upload reference images
refImageUpload.content: Drag, drop, or paste references for image-to-image generation.

refImageExtract.title: Image to prompt
refImageExtract.content: Extract prompt ideas from a reference image to get started faster.

templateMarket.title: Template market
templateMarket.content: Reuse popular templates to speed up generation.

generate.title: Start generation
generate.content: Review parameters and click to generate images.

historyTab.title: History tab
historyTab.content: Browse and manage your generated images.

historyViewToggle.title: View mode switch
historyViewToggle.content: Switch between timeline and album views.

historyAlbumCards.title: Album cards
historyAlbumCards.content: Organize images by folders for batch management.

historyCreateFolder.title: Create folder
historyCreateFolder.content: Create custom folders to organize images.

historyOpenFolderImages.title: Open folder images
historyOpenFolderImages.content: Click a folder to view images inside it.

historyMoveToFolder.title: Move to folder
historyMoveToFolder.content: Move selected images into a target folder.

historyDragToRef.title: Drag back to reference area
historyDragToRef.content: Drag history images to the reference area to continue generating.
